category_sources: source_facts.description says scanner for secrets and sensitive data in code; official GitGuardian docs describe ggshield as a CLI for detecting hundreds of secret types.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ggshield; official GitGuardian documentation and GitHub repository use ggshield.
docs_sources: Official GitGuardian documentation has a dedicated GitGuardian CLI (ggshield) docs section with home, getting started, and reference pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; official GitGuardian ggshield docs link to GitGuardian/ggshield as the open-source GitHub repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies secrets scanning; official docs describe local, CI, and git hook use for secret detection.
